name: SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameter
title: SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameter
syntax: long SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameter(char nodeName[], char networkName[], long key, qword value, char description[], dword descriptionLength)
description: Gets the value and description of the operation parameter of the specified key at the specified node and network.
You have to call SecurityLocalStartControlSimulationNode before this callback is called.
Which and how many operation parameters exist, which values are valid for an operation parameter differs from Security Source to Security Source.
Please refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about operation parameters. The manual can be opened from the Vector Security Manager on the OEM specific ribbon page.

parameters.name: char networkName[]
parameters.description: Name of the network in which the node is located.

parameters.name: long key
parameters.description: The numeric identifier of the operation parameter.

parameters.name: qword value
parameters.description: The current value of the operation parameter. [out]

parameters.name: char description[]
parameters.description: The buffer for the description of the parameter. Usable for output and documentation of the parameter i.e. Test Units if the buffer is too small the description is truncated. [in/out]

parameters.name: dword descriptionLength
parameters.description: The length of the description buffer [in]. If the specified length is zero, no description is returned (faster). The value of descriptionLength is changed to the length of the description if the specified buffer is not completely used. [out]

return: A value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
